source.title: GMV Triangulation Summary: 4 Methods Converging on RMB 5.0-6.0 Trillion

extractions.claim: TRIANGULATION RESULT: PDD Holdings consolidated GMV for 2025 estimated at RMB 5.0-6.0 trillion ($690-830 billion)
extractions.evidence:
FOUR-METHOD CONVERGENCE:

| Method | Domestic GMV | Temu GMV | Total GMV | Confidence |
|--------|-------------|----------|-----------|------------|
| 1. Revenue/Take Rate | RMB 3.9-5.4T | RMB 360-500B | RMB 4.3-5.9T | Medium-High |
| 2. Logistics Back-Calc | RMB 3.6-5.4T | N/A (domestic only) | N/A | Medium |
| 3. Third-Party Estimates | RMB 4.5-4.8T | RMB 360-510B | RMB 4.9-5.3T | Medium-High |
| 4. App Proxy (MAU x freq x AOV) | RMB 2.9-5.8T | N/A | N/A | Low-Medium |

WEIGHTED CONSENSUS:
- Domestic Pinduoduo GMV: RMB 4.2-5.0 trillion ($580-690B)
  - Methods 1 and 3 converge tightly around RMB 4.5-4.8T
  - Method 2 is consistent but wider range
  - Method 4 mid-point (4.2T) supports the lower bound
- Temu International GMV: RMB 360-510 billion ($50-70B)
  - $50B+ confirmed by multiple sources for 2025
  - Upper bound uncertain due to tariff disruptions
- CONSOLIDATED: RMB 5.0-6.0 trillion ($690-830B)
  - Best single estimate: ~RMB 5.2T ($720B)

GMV GROWTH TRAJECTORY:
- FY2022: ~RMB 3.0-3.3T (estimated)
- FY2023: ~RMB 3.8-4.2T (estimated, +25-30% YoY)
- FY2024: ~RMB 4.5-5.5T (estimated, +18-25% YoY)
- FY2025: ~RMB 5.0-6.0T (estimated, +10-15% YoY)
- PATTERN: GMV growth decelerating from 25-30% to 10-15% as platform matures

PER-GMV EFFICIENCY METRICS (using mid-point RMB 5.2T):
- Revenue/GMV (consolidated take rate): 393.8B/5.2T = 7.6% (inflated by Temu's high take rate)
- Domestic take rate: ~220B/4.5T = 4.9%
- Op Income/GMV: 108.4B/5.2T = 2.1% (industry-leading)
- This compares to Alibaba ~1.7% and JD ~1.0%

verification.verifier_notes: Triangulation from 4 independent methods using primary (XBRL revenue, ZTO parcel volumes, CBP customs data) and secondary (analyst estimates, ECDB, industry reports) sources. Revenue is high-confidence (SEC filing). Take rates, parcel attribution, and AOV are estimated. Range reflects genuine uncertainty — the 5.0-6.0T range captures the convergence zone of all four methods.
